description_long: This object is a modern fuel dispenser unit commonly found at PEMEX gas stations. The structure is rectangular with a robust metallic frame and features three distinct fuel pumps, each with its own colored nozzle and hose: green for Magna, red for Premium, and black for Diesel. The front panel is branded with the PEMEX logo and color scheme, and above the pumps are digital or analog display panels for fuel selection and transaction information. Multiple hoses hang from the top and sides, indicating multi-sided access for vehicles. The unit is primarily constructed from metal with plastic and rubber components for the hoses and nozzles, and it is designed to be fixed in place for vehicle refueling. No canopy, price board, or convenience store entrance is visible in the images.
description: A modern PEMEX-branded fuel dispenser with three colored fuel pumps, digital displays, and multiple hoses, designed for vehicle refueling.
description_view_0: Front view showing three fuel pumps with colored nozzles, PEMEX branding, and visible hoses.
description_view_1: Side view showing the narrow profile of the dispenser and hoses extending from the sides.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, with visible pumps, hoses, and branding.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and hoses.
attribute_fuel_pumps: Three modern fuel pumps are present, each with a distinct colored nozzle (green, red, black) and flexible hoses. The pumps are vertically aligned on the front panel, with digital or analog display panels above each. The style is modern, and the PEMEX branding is clearly visible.
attribute_station_signage: The PEMEX logo and name are prominently displayed on the front panel in white and red against a green background. Above each pump, there are colored labels indicating fuel types: Magna (green), Premium (red), and Diesel (black). No other signage is visible.
